title: Add condition "if update has text" for when update is created
excerpt: In automations we have trigger for “When update is created”, it would be awesome to add a condition “only if update has XXX”, that would filter updates, before triggering the action.

posts.author: lanyere (Yerlan)
posts.cookedHtml: In automations we have trigger for “When update is created”, it would be awesome to add a condition “only if update has XXX”, that would filter updates, before triggering the action.
